description: Comprehensive ASP.NET Core monitoring dashboard using OpenTelemetry .NET automatic instrumentation metrics exported via Prometheus. Covers HTTP server performance, Kestrel server, .NET runtime garbage collector, and OS-level process metrics.
title: ASP.NET Core — Prometheus (OpenTelemetry)

widgets.description: Total HTTP server requests per second across all routes
widgets.title: Request Rate

widgets.description: 99th percentile request latency (slowest 1% of requests)
widgets.title: P99 Request Latency

widgets.description: Median (50th percentile) request latency
widgets.title: P50 Request Latency

widgets.description: Percentage of HTTP requests resulting in 5xx server errors
widgets.title: Error Rate (5xx)

widgets.description: Number of HTTP requests currently being processed
widgets.title: Active Requests

widgets.description: Number of currently active TCP connections to Kestrel
widgets.title: Active Kestrel Connections

widgets.description: HTTP request throughput per second, grouped by service
widgets.title: Request Rate Over Time

widgets.description: Latency distribution over time — compare median vs tail latency
widgets.title: Request Latency Percentiles (P50 / P90 / P99)

widgets.description: Request rate broken down by HTTP response status code
widgets.title: Requests by HTTP Status Code

widgets.description: Rate of 4xx client errors and 5xx server errors over time
widgets.title: Error Rate by Service (4xx vs 5xx)

widgets.description: Top HTTP routes by request volume — useful for identifying hot paths
widgets.title: Request Rate by Route

widgets.description: Tail latency (P99) per route — pinpoint slow endpoints
widgets.title: P99 Latency by Route

widgets.description: Distribution of inbound request payload sizes (P50 and P99)
widgets.title: Request Body Size Percentiles

widgets.description: Distribution of outbound response payload sizes (P50 and P99)
widgets.title: Response Body Size Percentiles

widgets.description: Number of active TCP connections held open by Kestrel
widgets.title: Active Kestrel Connections

widgets.description: Connections waiting to be accepted and requests queued by thread pool
widgets.title: Queued Connections & Requests

widgets.description: Rate of connections rejected by Kestrel (e.g., max connections limit reached)
widgets.title: Rejected Connections Rate

widgets.description: How long TCP connections stay open — P50 vs P99
widgets.title: Connection Duration Percentiles

widgets.description: Size of managed heap memory by GC generation (gen0, gen1, gen2, LOH)
widgets.title: GC Heap Size by Generation

widgets.description: Rate of garbage collections by generation — high gen2 rate indicates memory pressure
widgets.title: GC Collections per Second

widgets.description: 99th percentile time spent in GC pauses — directly impacts request latency
widgets.title: GC Pause Duration (P99)

widgets.description: Number of .NET thread pool worker threads over time
widgets.title: Thread Pool Thread Count

widgets.description: Rate of process CPU usage — user vs system time
widgets.title: CPU Time by Mode

widgets.description: Resident set size — actual physical memory used by the process
widgets.title: Process Working Set (RSS)

widgets.description: Total number of OS threads created by the process
widgets.title: Process Thread Count

widgets.description: Virtual memory size committed to the process
widgets.title: Virtual Memory Size
